error_signature: data not resolving in WeWeb from Xano collection
title: Xano collection not fetching all related records
symptom: When fetching data from a Xano collection, some related records are missing in WeWeb, despite being present in the direct API response.
not_this_if: Data is correctly fetched in direct API calls
root_cause: The issue arises when a repeat container is bound to a custom JavaScript formula that inadvertently filters the data. This can lead to incomplete data being displayed in WeWeb, as the formula modifies the data during the fetch process.
fix_steps: Review the custom JavaScript formula used in the repeat container
Ensure that the formula does not filter or modify the data incorrectly
Test the collection again to verify all data is fetched
agent_instruction: Check and adjust the custom JavaScript formula to prevent data filtering.
